corners.name: Prima Variante
corners.notes: First chicane. Heavy braking from 340 km/h. Incident zone on lap 1.

corners.name: Seconda Variante
corners.notes: Second chicane. DRS opens on approach to Lesmo.

corners.name: Seconda Variante di Lesmo
corners.notes: The Lesmo complex. Taken in 5th gear at ~180 km/h.

corners.name: Variante Ascari
corners.notes: Named after Alberto Ascari. The fastest chicane in F1; cut kerbs heavily used.

corners.name: Curva Parabolica (Alboreto)
corners.notes: Final corner. Long-radius sweep. Full power before mid-point. Renamed Alboreto.
